description:
Create a new Security Service Audit record in Eramba to document the quarterly review of the 'Email Security Gateway (Phishing Defense)' service. The record should include the following details:

- Security Service: 'Email Security Gateway (Phishing Defense)'
- Planned Date: 2025-03-31
- Start Date: 2025-03-15
- End Date: 2025-03-28
- Result/Status: Pass (or Compliant)
- Description: 'Quarterly effectiveness audit of the email security gateway. Reviewed phishing detection rates, false positive ratios, and incident response times for Q1 2025. Tested gateway rules against 50 simulated phishing samples from the APWG eCrime dataset. Detection rate was 96%, exceeding the 90% threshold. Two false positives identified involving legitimate marketing emails with URL shorteners — configuration tuning recommendation issued.'
